CAProfile.Name: ev-tracker
CAProfile.Author: fdreckmann
CAProfile.Description: EV Tracker — Ladeprotokoll für Elektrofahrzeuge. Erfasst Ladevorgänge, Fahrzeugdaten, Live-Zählerstände, Wallbox-Anbindung, Kosten und Exporte. Unterstützt Home Assistant, Tasmota, Shelly, EVCC, OpenWB, go-e, WARP, Alfen, Webasto, Juice und Generic HTTP als Datenquellen. Mehrere Fahrzeuge, automatische Session-Erkennung, Excel-Export, Backup und API.
CAProfile.Overview: EV Tracker is a self-hosted charging log for electric vehicles. It tracks charging sessions, vehicle data, live meter readings, wallbox integration, costs and exports. Supports Home Assistant, Tasmota, Shelly, EVCC, OpenWB, go-e, WARP, Alfen, Webasto, Juice, and Generic HTTP as data sources. Supports multiple vehicles, automatic session detection, Excel export, backup, and API.

Port.Description: Web UI port for the EV Tracker dashboard

Volume.Description: Storage location for config, database, exports and backups
